{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":10}","has_more":true,"total":3037},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7284466271390106426","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"构思和写作都作了精心构架，立意和世界观都正，作者尽量还原世界的本来面目，虽有些地方还不尽人意，但也是良心之作！只希望用写完不要乱了分寸把后面写毁，等待精品出现！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1696047882,"group_id":"7276619121939205182","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2aTtW6aGfKzcNvL1gbpvHSLRUC3RNEKVpHid9m0a/eu","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776704205&x-signature=yZBRyurrKDTyW8Ks9x781%2BPALhc%3D","user_id":"2384165752821837","user_name":"青江的老蒙"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2384165752821837","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1647505460,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7276619121939205182","book_info":{"abstract":"从2035重生到黄金年代1989，华夏顶级芯片专家徐华盛带着满脑子科技知识站在风口浪尖上，发誓这辈子不再憋屈。
　从VCD产业开始，家电，传呼机，手机，芯片，光刻机，互联网，汽车，无人机，新能源，医疗器械，火箭，卫星，从自家电子厂开始，徐华盛开始打造属于自己的科技帝国，助力华夏重回世界巅。峰。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/138cccd0b67277a2d74c7e4d9c8383f1","author":"千海观音","author_id":"","book_id":"7276619121939205182","book_name":"重生1989：从小厂到军工巨头","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":263,"name":"都市种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=263&name=都市种田&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7276619257830457918","read_count":"97657","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3273674"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"1671","tags":"都市种田,都市,重生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/67140f462decd796a866d39353952b32~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779320879&x-signature=gvZHt66wnmzOX0xffIUGyo7YfEo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"86937804589","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.0630097e+07"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":18,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":10066,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":20696,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":57516},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7288254109399941903","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这可能是我看过写80.90年代最好的一本书了。写的真是行云流水，文笔清晰，思路敏捷。。看的我是爱不释手啊！重要的主线剧情会很细心的讲解，证明作者很有功底，不重要的一笔带过。。就是写的太少了，，，已经收藏，加油写啊！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1696930918,"group_id":"7276619121939205182","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8NR54AX/feQxPosrIfhAVQyxre00SFflR2oxis0mN5g","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0a8f755157244a138232acb745f885db~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702378&x-signature=i6WgLVcgOjPrSK%2FNwjm30VEarIw%3D","user_id":"1626933328621680","user_name":"平淡0人生"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1626933328621680","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7276619121939205182","book_info":{"abstract":"从2035重生到黄金年代1989，华夏顶级芯片专家徐华盛带着满脑子科技知识站在风口浪尖上，发誓这辈子不再憋屈。

文笔流畅,第三点题材虽然有点老旧但是应用的让人感受不到太多的俗感。而这就是我作为几年老书虫的感受。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1696629729,"group_id":"7276619121939205182","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"番茄的好书，真的很难找，而自己喜欢的书，那更难找了","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nx1p7rgvQLbF2qQxXqukgGgzrxkjiRGooQaUg1rtYoKK","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/09424ef98aba4a6fb47610607285b27e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776701895&x-signature=Q50V%2FGBrjY1ctWFyd6txWgyrSkw%3D","user_id":"3501286013022765","user_name":"提莫飞雪"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3501286013022765","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7276619121939205182","book_info":{"abstract":"从2035重生到黄金年代1989，华夏顶级芯片专家徐华盛带着满脑子科技知识站在风口浪尖上，发誓这辈子不再憋屈。
